programme.title: Live: NCAA Women's Gymnastics Championship Preview
programme.desc: What to expect from the upcoming NCAA Women's Gymnastics Championship from Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Live: Women's College Gymnastics
programme.desc: College athletes compete to claim the 2026 Women's Gymnastics Championship. From Dickies Arena in Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Eyewitness News at 6
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: ABC World News Tonight With David Muir
programme.desc: Delivering the news that matters most.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: NBA Tip-Off
programme.desc: Host Ernie Johnson and analysts Shaquille O'Neal, Charles Barkley and Kenny Smith ready viewers for NBA action before ESPN's Wednesday night doubleheaders (and other select telecasts). Guest analysts also are featured from time to time.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Lakers host the Rockets for Game 1 of their Western Conference First Round. This matchup features a legendary showdown between LeBron James and Kevin Durant. The Lakers finished the season with a 53-29 record, while the Rockets finished at 52-30.

programme.title: Live: Inside the NBA
programme.desc: This Emmy Award-winning studio show, which airs following NBA telecasts on ESPN, is hosted by Ernie Johnson, with analysis from Hall of Famer Charles Barkley and NBA champions Kenny Smith and Shaquille O'Neal. It's a mix of highlights, interviews and hijinks, notably the verbal sparring sessions between the outspoken Barkley and his straight man, Smith. The show also welcomes various guest analysts throughout the season.

programme.title: Eyewitness News at 11
programme.desc: Breaking news.

The 118 responds to a skydiving trip gone wrong; a bank rep is injured in a home repossession; a lovestruck assistant's lunch run ends in disaster; Athena and the family come to terms with Michael's difficult health decision.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: The 118 responds to a viral stunt gone haywire, a disaster at a couple's fishing trip and an epic first date fail; Athena investigates a woman who doesn't remember being shot in the head; Eddie must have a difficult conversation with Christopher.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fast: Home Rescue
programme.desc: Tre and Cierra Boston rebuild the Brown family house in New Orleans after it's wrecked by Hurricane Ida; with five days to pull it off, they transform the property into an Artist Retreat themed home.

programme.title: Beautiful Homes & Great Estates
programme.desc: Located in the affluent neighborhood of Bel Air, the six-bedroom, 11-bath mansion is composed of three levels and an upper sun deck.

programme.title: The American Athlete
programme.desc: Olympic Surfer Alan Cleland; surfer and diver Andrew Alexander King; Olympic athlete Steph Rovetti.

programme.title: Entertainers: With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Dylan O'Brien ("Send Help"); Sarah Michelle Gellar; Anderson .Paak; Jessica Chastain; Ke Huy Quan ("Zootopia 2"); Annabelle Wallis; Tina Kim; Kate Winslet ("Avatar: Fire and Ash"); Dennis Quaid; Pamela Anderson ("The Naked Gun"); Olivia Dean.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Small Town Big Deal
programme.desc: Learning how to mush a team of sled dogs; exploring a massive walk-through ice sculpture that grows a little more each night.

programme.title: Eyewitness News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: News coverage to start the day.

programme.title: Good Morning America
programme.desc: Early morning news and entertainment program that covers important issues with key figures from around the world and a wide spectrum of topics, including medicine, finance, consumer issues, computer technology, education and gardening.

programme.title: Eyewitness News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: News coverage to start the day.

programme.title: This Week With George Stephanopoulos
programme.desc: Mike Waltz, U.S. ambassador to the United Nations; Rep. Ro Khanna (D-Calif.); Reem Al Hashimy, Emirati politician; Iran analysis with Steve Ganyard and Karim Sadjadpour; roundtable discussion with Donna Brazile, Chris Christie and Ramesh Ponnuru.

programme.title: Eyewitness News Up Close
programme.desc: Getting to the heart of the matter, whether it’s about how things are working in government, or how they’re not working; it shows how public-policy decisions are made.

programme.title: Tiempo
programme.desc: Hosted by Joe Torres.

programme.title: Home for Good
programme.desc: A home makeover series honoring America's everyday heroes, including military veterans, first responders, Gold Star families, and community champions; recipients are nominated for their incredible service and surprised with a home design refresh.

programme.title: NBA Tip-Off
programme.desc: Host Ernie Johnson and analysts Shaquille O'Neal, Charles Barkley and Kenny Smith ready viewers for NBA action before ESPN's Wednesday night doubleheaders (and other select telecasts). Guest analysts also are featured from time to time.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Celtics host the 76ers at TD Garden for East Game 1. Neemias Queta gave a spark with 27 points and 17 rebounds in a March 1 win. The 76ers rely on star guard Tyrese Maxey, who had two high scoring matches in the past to improve their recent play.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: Western Conference First Round, Game 1.

programme.sub-title: That's Using Your Noggin, The Great Outdoors, and Copy Cats

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officers Nolan, Chen and West are squeezed harder than ever before as their training officers evaluate whether they are truly ready for the job; one of the rookie classmates is involved in a shooting.

programme.title: This Week With George Stephanopoulos
programme.desc: Mike Waltz, U.S. ambassador to the United Nations; Rep. Ro Khanna (D-Calif.); Reem Al Hashimy, Emirati politician; Iran analysis with Steve Ganyard and Karim Sadjadpour; roundtable discussion with Donna Brazile, Chris Christie and Ramesh Ponnuru.

programme.title: Good Morning America First Look
programme.desc: ABC's "Good Morning America First Look" brings one overnight breaking news, weather, politics, and the stories and video people will be talking about in the day ahead.

programme.desc: News coverage to start the day.

programme.title: Eyewitness News This Morning
programme.desc: News coverage to start the day.

programme.title: Good Morning America
programme.desc: Actress Meryl Streep; actress Quinta Brunson; actor Henry Winkler; author Rachel Goldberg-Polin; actor Quinton Aaron.

programme.title: Live with Kelly and Mark
programme.desc: Vincent D'Onofrio talks about Marvel Studios' "Daredevil: Born Again"; Bear Grylls is here; the hosts open up "The Inbox"!

programme.title: Eyewitness News Mornings at 10
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: The View
programme.desc: Created in 1997 by veteran journalist Barbara Walters, "The View" is a daytime talk show hosted by women -- including Whoopi Goldberg, Joy Behar, Sunny Hostin, Sara Haines, Alyssa Farah Griffin and Ana Navarro -- and each offers her take on the day's news during the opening "Hot Topics" segment. Later, the ladies welcome various celebrities, who join them in a chat or perform for the audience. The program also offers tips on beauty, fashion, diet and relationships. Known for their freewheeling style, the hosts are often lampooned in late-night sketches.

programme.title: Eyewitness News at Noon
programme.desc: Midday news update.

programme.title: GMA3
programme.desc: Actor William Stanford Davis; actor Henry Winkler; ABC Secret Savings with Lori Bergamotto; GMA Health Alert with Dr. Darien Sutton.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.desc: "The Real Housewives of New Jersey's" Paul Connell and Dolores Catania open up about his recent eyelid lift surgery and breaking the stigma around men and cosmetic procedures; plastic surgeon Dr. Mark Karolak; the viral trend around men's fertility; viral barber Edgar Hernandez; how men are embracing makeup as part of their everyday routines.

programme.title: General Hospital
programme.desc: Ethan and Kristina catch up; Sonny gets an unexpected visitor; Michael gets new intel; Willow is determined; Carly is startled.

programme.title: Eyewitness News First at 4
programme.desc: Local and regional news coverage.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Nolan is put to the test when he's forced to protect a man he doesn't trust; Lucy and Celina follow a promising lead; Lopez finds herself conflicted about Wesley's new position.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Eyewitness News at 11
programme.desc: Breaking news.

programme.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
programme.desc: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

programme.title: Nightline
programme.desc: In-depth reporting on one or more of the major stories in the news, with occasional segments on pop culture; journalists Juju Chang and Byron Pitts share hosting duties for this late-night program.

programme.title: ABC World News Tonight With David Muir
programme.desc: Delivering the news that matters most.

programme.title: The View
programme.desc: Created in 1997 by veteran journalist Barbara Walters, "The View" is a daytime talk show hosted by women -- including Whoopi Goldberg, Joy Behar, Sunny Hostin, Sara Haines, Alyssa Farah Griffin and Ana Navarro -- and each offers her take on the day's news during the opening "Hot Topics" segment. Later, the ladies welcome various celebrities, who join them in a chat or perform for the audience. The program also offers tips on beauty, fashion, diet and relationships. Known for their freewheeling style, the hosts are often lampooned in late-night sketches.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.desc: The aura-maxxing trend; student manager for the McNeese State Cowboys Men's Basketball Team, Amir "Aura" Khan; Rosie Sparky and prof. Melvin Williams talk about aura points; author and podcast host Mystic Michaela breaks down what your aura color means; aura photographer Eileen Lee.
